fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 61 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which incorrectly accepts bookings that are adjacent to existing ones (e.g., end time of new booking equals start time of an existing one). The check should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to reject such cases.

spec.expr: all(b__1 < s or a__1 > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: A new window must be strictly non-overlapping with all existing bookings in the timeline.

spec.expr: all(a__1 != e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new booking's start time must not coincide with any existing booking's end time.

spec.expr: all(b__1 != s for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new booking's end time must not coincide with any existing booking's start time.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or not any(window[1] == s or window[0] == e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If a booking is accepted, it must not be merely adjacent to any existing booking.
